channel.title: docker on Abhishek's blog
channel.description: Recent content in docker on Abhishek's blog

item.title: Enhance local development experience using the Azure Cosmos DB Linux emulator and VS Code
item.description: This blog post provides a quick overview and demo of how you can use the Azure Cosmos DB Linux Emulator on Docker (in preview at the time of writing) along with Visual Studio Code in order to enhance your local development experience.

item.title: Kubexpose: A Kubernetes Operator, for fun and profit!
item.description: Say you have a web service running as a Kubernetes Deployment. There are a bunch of ways to access it over a public URL, but Kubexpose makes it easy to do so.

item.title: Getting started with Kafka Connector for Azure Cosmos DB using Docker
item.description: Having a local development environment is quite handy when trying out a new service or technology. Docker has emerged as the de-facto choice in such cases.

item.title: Redis Streams in Action - Part 4 (Serverless Go app to monitor tweets processor)
item.description: Welcome to this series of blog posts which covers Redis Streams with the help of a practical example. We will use a sample application to make Twitter data available for search and query in real-time.

item.title: Redis Streams in Action - Part 3 (Java app to process tweets with Redis Streams)
item.description: Welcome to this series of blog posts which covers Redis Streams with the help of a practical example. We will use a sample application to make Twitter data available for search and query in real-time.

item.title: Redis Streams in Action — Part 2 (Tweets consumer app)
item.description: Welcome to this series of blog posts which covers Redis Streams with the help of a practical example. We will use a sample application to make Twitter data available for search and query in real-time.

item.title: Redis Streams in Action: Part 1 (Intro and overview)
item.description: Welcome to this series of blog posts which covers Redis Streams with the help of a practical example. We will use a sample application to make Twitter data available for search and query in real-time.

item.title: RediSearch in Action
item.description: Redis has a versatile set of data structures ranging from simple Strings all the way to powerful abstractions such as Redis Streams.
